description_long: This object is a compact, modern-looking rifle with a rectangular upper receiver and a long, cylindrical barrel extending from one end. The grip is ergonomically shaped and appears to be made of a textured, matte black material, designed for comfortable handling. The trigger guard is integrated into the lower receiver, and the trigger itself is clearly visible. The upper receiver has a flat, boxy profile with some surface wear or markings, suggesting frequent use or handling. There are no visible external magazines, sights, or stock extensions, giving the rifle a minimalist and utilitarian appearance. The overall design is streamlined, with a focus on functionality and ease of use in urban environments.
description: A compact, boxy rifle with a long barrel, ergonomic black grip, and minimalist design. The surface shows some wear, and there are no visible sights or magazine.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the rectangular upper receiver, long barrel, and ergonomic grip.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel's circular opening and the narrow profile of the upper receiver.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the grip, trigger, and the length of the barrel.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the upper receiver and the grip, with the barrel extending away from the viewer.
